name: Porto Potenza Picena
description: Nearest sandy beach, 10 min from agriturismo. Equipped and free sections.

name: Porto Recanati
description: Nearest pebble beach, 15 min away. Smooth stone beaches, lively seafront.

name: Portonovo Bay
description: Dramatic cliffs and turquoise water. Mezzavalle, La Vela, and Portonovo beaches.

name: Sirolo Beaches
description: Spiaggia di San Michele, Sassi Neri, Spiaggia Urbani. Accessible by foot or shuttle.

name: Monte Conero
description: Forests, Mediterranean scrub, and cliffside trails. 30 min from agriturismo.

name: Sibillini Mountains
description: Alpine peaks over 2,000m, clear lakes, remote trails. Great for hiking and biking.

name: Elcito & Canfaito
description: Tibet of the Marche. Famous for autumn beech foliage.

name: Sarnano
description: Base for hikes to waterfalls and peaks.

name: Lame Rosse
description: Unique red rock formations near Lago di Fiastra.

name: Lake Fiastra
description: Swimming, hiking, picnics.

name: Lake Cingoli
description: Emerald waters, dam views, ideal for families.

name: Cantina Andrea Giorgetti
description: Wine tasting with sunset views and aperitivo platter. Thu-Sun from 19:00.

name: Il Giardino dell'Alpaca
description: 2-hour guided alpaca walk through woods and vineyards.

name: Frasassi Caves
description: Europe's most impressive cave system + Tempietto del Valadier sanctuary.

name: Vespa Tour Marche
description: Vespa rentals and tours through countryside, villages, and coastal roads.

name: Loreto
description: Famous pilgrimage site with a majestic basilica.

name: Montelupone
description: One of Italy's most beautiful villages. Romanesque abbey, medieval walls.

name: Recanati
description: Hometown of poet Giacomo Leopardi. Hill of Infinity.

name: Osimo
description: Elegant hill town with Roman ruins and underground tunnels.

name: Macerata
description: Renaissance cathedral, historic university, Teatro Lauro Rossi.

name: Treia
description: Hilltop gem with noble palaces and Disfida del Bracciale.

name: Fermo
description: Rich history, Renaissance architecture, Adriatic views. Thursday antiques market.
